REDDWARF-RED_DWARF.banter.alive.endTurnP: Get a move on for smeg's sake!'
REDDWARF-RED_DWARF.cardsModifierDescript: Red Dwarf cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
REDDWARF-RED_DWARF.description: Another botched attempt to return to earth using the Holly Hop Drive instead lands the boys from The Dwarf at the foot of the Spire.
REDDWARF-RED_DWARF.goldMonologue: [sine]Money doesn't mean much when you're three millions years into deep space...[/sine]
REDDWARF-RED_DWARF.title: Dwarfers
